title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 2 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 2 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 2 2026
summary:
Main
The DCE iron ore futures shifted from weak to strong today, with the most-traded contract I2609 closing at 786.5 yuan/mt,up 0.77% from the previous trading price. Port spot prices rose by 3-5 yuan accordingly. Traders actively quoted and sold; steel mills showed increasing wait-andsee sentiment, mainly purchasing as needed; overall market trading activity was moderate.
